song.title: When the Lord Turned Again the Captivity of Zion
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V4 V5 C V1
song.lyrics:
[V1] When the Lord turned again the captivity of Zion, We were like them that dream, We were like them that dream.
[V2] Then was our mouth filled with laughter, And our tongue with singing: Then said they among the nations, The Lord hath done great things, The Lord hath done great things for them.
[C] The Lord hath done great things for us; Whereof we are glad. The Lord hath done great things for us; Whereof we are glad.
[V4] Turn again our captivity, O Lord, as the streams, As the streams in the south, As the streams in the south.|| They that sow in tears shall reap in joy, They that sow in tears shall reap in joy.
[V5] He that goeth forth and weepeth, Bearing precious seed, shall doubtless, Come again with rejoicing, Come again with rejoicing, Bringing his sheaves with him.
